metaTitle: Lorem Ipsum Generator — Free Placeholder Text Generator
metaDescription: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text instantly. Choose paragraphs, sentences or words. Optional HTML tags included. 100% free and works offline.

howto.description: Select whether you want to generate by paragraphs, sentences, or words.
Use the slider to choose how much text to generate.
Click Copy to copy the generated text to your clipboard instantly.

why: Generate by paragraphs, sentences, or words — your choice
Optional HTML paragraph tags for web development use
Works completely offline after the initial page load
No sign-up, no limits, completely free forever

faq.a: Lorem Ipsum is placeholder text commonly used in design and publishing. It originates from a Latin text by Cicero and has been used as dummy text since the 1960s.

faq.q: Why do designers use Lorem Ipsum?
faq.a: Lorem Ipsum allows designers to focus on layout and visual design without being distracted by readable content. It simulates real text without conveying any meaning.

faq.q: What is the HTML tags option?
faq.a:
When enabled, each paragraph is wrapped in

tags, making it ready to paste directly into HTML code.

faq.q: Can I generate just a few words?
faq.a: Yes. Switch to Words mode and set the amount to generate any number of words from 1 to 200.

faq.q: Is the generated text always the same?
faq.a: No. The text is randomly generated each time so you always get fresh placeholder content.

troubleshooting: Text not updating? Ensure the quantity slider is set to at least 1. The generator updates in real-time as you change the values.
HTML tags not showing? Check if the 'Include HTML Tags' toggle is enabled before clicking the copy button.
Copy to clipboard failed? This can happen in some older browsers. Try selecting the text manually if the 'Copy' button doesn't work.
proTips: Use 'Words' mode to generate short strings for buttons or navigation menu items to see how they fit your layout.
Enable HTML tags to save time when building prototypes; you can paste the result directly into your code editor.
If you're designing for a specific language, remember that Lorem Ipsum has a Latin-like distribution of letters, which is ideal for testing English or European layouts.
